title: Counting Game
description: Take turns counting up. Don't repeat yourself!
rulesLine1: Send the next number in sequence.
rulesLine2: You can't follow your own number (but you can restart from 1).
rulesLine3: Any mistake resets the count to 0.
onlyGroups: This command only works in groups.
onlyAdmins: Only group admins can enable/disable counting.
notEnabled: Counting is not enabled in this chat. An admin can enable it with !counting on
